meanings.definition: the pursuit and killing or capture of wild animals regarded as a sport
the activity of looking thoroughly in order to find something or someone
the work of finding and killing or capturing animals for food or pelts
pursue for food or sport (as of wild animals)
examples: Goering often hunted wild boars in Poland
The Duke hunted in these woods
The hunters traced the deer into the woods
the detectives hounded the suspect until they found him

meanings.definition: chase away, with as with force
examples: They hunted the unwanted immigrants out of the neighborhood

meanings.definition: yaw back and forth about a flight path
oscillate about a desired speed, position, or state to an undesirable extent
examples: The oscillator hunts about the correct frequency
She hunted for her reading glasses but was unable to locate them
The King used to hunt these forests
